dsl_rule.translation_notes: Gap open lower detected by comparing open < prev_close. Black candle confirmation represented by close < open (bearish candle). Bear market regime explicitly constrained to TRENDING_DOWN. Exit on white candle (close > open) reversal. No volume or success rate parameters available in source text, so reasonable defaults applied.

backtest_rule.reason: Gap open lower detected by comparing open < prev_close. Black candle confirmation represented by close < open (bearish candle). Bear market regime explicitly constrained to TRENDING_DOWN. Exit on white candle (close > open) reversal. No volume or success rate parameters available in source text, so reasonable defaults applied.

source_rule_text: Gap pattern with candle color confirmation in bear market: price gaps open lower the next day, wait for a black candle to appear before trading
